TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Kulu_huda, title = Kulu_huda, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kulu_huda} }

S.FORM: = Kulu huda = Psaun dha ana manu uuqan ka ruwan kulu huda nii, saw ka ana manu sama, wawa, qsurux, tmsamac dnii...
S.PHON: = kulu ħuda = psaun dħa ana manu uuqan ka ɾuwan kulu ħuda nii, saw ka ana manu sama, wawa, qsuɾux, tmsamaʦ dnii...
S.FORM: = Kulu huda = Psaun dha ana manu uuqan ka ruwan kulu huda nii, saw ka ana manu sama, wawa, qsurux, tmsamac dnii...
S.PHON: = kulu ħuda = psaun dħa ana manu uuqan ka ɾuwan kulu ħuda nii, saw ka ana manu sama, wawa, qsuɾux, tmsamaʦ dnii...
